example: I'm so nervous that it's the first time I'm going on a plane.
Brazil in South America has a tropical climate and it will be hot.
A suitcase is an object which we use to keep clothes while traveling.
The travel guide recommends popular places that we should visit.
The plane is a means of transportation used for long distance traveling.
To travel by plane, you need to go to the airport.
The flight attendant explains how to fasten your seatbelt.
Fasten your seatbelt during the flight.
The flight attendant shows how to use the life jacket.
My ears are clogged because of the altitude.
It's turbulence that makes the plane move so much.
Air currents make you feel we move in a bumpy way.
Would you like to see the cockpit when we land?
I'm eager to pick up the suitcases at the airport.
Tihuka National Park is a huge national reserve.
David wants to go to the Maraca National Stadium.
Shall we stop at the food stand to eat something?
Grandpa said tapiocas taste like pancakes.
What an adventure traveling with your family is!
Don't forget to stay close to an adult when you visit new places.
